rationale: Review 2 correctly identifies that genuinely general lemmas like TauCeti.BialgHom.map_antipode and TauCeti.Bialgebra.TensorProduct.map_id/map_comp are marked private, blocking downstream reuse within TauCeti — a real, material issue for the reuse rubric that Review 1 entirely missed. Some of Review 2's other findings (includeRight_apply, map_tmul) are debatable or weaker, but one solid finding beats zero.
